entry.title: Bank determination configuration for Virtual Card payment method
entry.content:
Our client is using supplier financing with Virtual card as one of the payment method for vendor payments

In FBZP under payment method at country. i selected Supplier financing under payment method classification

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/b2d44c1091094b5a810c2a879ee95522/456ad556235247d0bcefe88572406429.html?version=2023.001

Issue with bank determination

  1. when generating the payment proposal for all company codes it is looking for bank determination configuration (error)
  2. At the  time of payment run money doesn't go out of clients bank account but the bank finances to the vendor from its own funds and issue Virtual cards to the vendors.
  3. At the end of the month bank will issue a invoice to clients only for the used virtual cards.
  4. Monthly payment will go out of only clients bank account.

As there is no link with the bank account, Can you advice how this can be managed in FBZP as there is no House bank and Account ID for Virtual card payment method.

entry.title: PSM Funds Management Closing Operations
entry.content:
Hi All

I am working on Budgeting in Funds Management. In the closing operations we have FMDM -Closing Operations Monitor. Here Carry fwd budget for commitments is disallowed                     ( Screenshot). My project requires to carry forward of budget for commitments to next year. How I can make it allowed. 

Please let me know

entry.title: Carry forward of Residual Budget to next year
entry.content:
Hi 

I want to carryover residual budget to next year. I execute Tcode FMMPCOVRN for this. Every time I run this it shows error like -Release and Budget amounts are inconsistent or the Budget amount is not sufficient for the release. I also tried with Budget with automatic release.  Please let me know how to resolve the issue

entry.title: Cost centers and distribution rules - SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hi, within financials, I have set up cost centers and also a distribution rule  to allocate costs (based on headcount) to a group of cost centers.  When I use this distribution rule on an AP invoice, the related journal only has the distribution rule had against it and does not split the value of the AP Invoice line across the associated cost centers.  

When I try running a P&L report for one of these costs centers, the system does not include the value of the AP invoice apportionment.

How do I get the system to split the cost per cost center?

entry.title: Error Message AA450 when Posting Invoices , T-code ZARIBA_PARKED & MR11
entry.content:
Dear SAP Gurus,

We are encountering an error when attempting to post an invoice using the T-code ZARIBA_PARKED or Clearing inventory differences with tcode MR11.  The following error message appears:

"You cannot post with transaction type 3Z4."
Message no. AA450

However, we are not entering this transaction type during the process.

This issue only occurs with certain invoices. Could you please assist us in identifying the cause and solution?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: skip step in document splitting s/4hana
entry.content:
Hi SAPiens,

How can I skip a step in this case SIS_MAN_SP in document splitting cockpit FINS_MPROJ_COCKPI_06? 

This step was already done, but because of a SAP Note implementation we had to restart the whole cycle and now it fails with "Document splitting for company code <> can't be activated".

We don't need to have this check done now.

Is there any configuration in SPRO or maint. view based on we can skip this?

We want to avoid changing the activation date in debug mode or with FINSV_SIS_PR maint view.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Split valuation - standard cost estimate CK11N
entry.content:
We use split valuation (for outside procurement and also for in-house production).

Valuation type 1 - Production
Valuation type 2 - External procurement

I am trying to calculate the cost of a material.

For a material with procurement type "F," there are materials belonging to two valuation types, both with a standard price.

My first strategy in the cost calculation variant is the standard price.

When running CK11N, even though the materials for both valuation types have a standard price, it still returns an error.

However, when I enter a standard price for the header material, CK11N runs successfully and returns the value I entered (header material standard price).

Normally, it should take the standard price from the valuation type corresponding to the externally procured value, but I can't understand the issue here.

All the settings in transaction code OMWC appear to be correct; I have double-checked multiple times.

Why is it including the header material in the cost calculation?
I would greatly appreciate your assistance.

entry.title: Where can i learn more about creating and using overhead cost sheets
entry.content: In which learning environment or course id, do we have content and training materials on creating Overhead cost sheets and using them in customer projects.

entry.title: House Bank company code not in dev but in prd
entry.content:
In PRD some company codes have multiple house banks and some only have one.  I need to update some of the information, so it will be a transport from DEV.  However, in DEV there is no house bank information for those company codes.

My concern/question is say company code 1234 has house bank 1, 2, 3 in PRD. In Dev it has no house bank, so I create 1 with the new information.  When I transport this change to PRD will it just update 1 or will it remove 2, 3?

entry.title: Output control F-36
entry.content:
When we post a document in transaction F-36 for post dated checks. We get a new screen "Overview Output Management: Output" that we would like to deactivate and skip in this process. How may we deactivate it?

Thanks!

entry.title: "Remordplan" column in S_ALR_87013558
entry.content:
How to enable the "Remordplan" column in the S_ALR_87013558 report so that values ​​are displayed in that column?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom fields from Profitablity Segment do not appear in Clear G/L Accounts app
entry.content:
Dear Community, 

We have created custom fields in profitability segment, and we are using them in lots of scenarios. 

But in the app "Clear G/L Accounts - manual clearing", when posting to a g/l account, in the profit. segment those custom fields do not appear (only standard fields are available).

Our custom fields have been created in FINS_MARKET_SEGMENT context, and are activated in User Interface FAC_GL_MANUAL_CLEARING_SRV (FinsPostingGLItemProfitbltySgmt). 

Is it a standard behavior or do we need to activate something else?

Thank you,

Regards

Anaïs

entry.title: DMEE Tree Special Character Handlling - Subnode Level
entry.content:
Hello ! 

     We are using CGI_XML_CT Tree as our base XML tree for DMEE. At the PstlAdr node I have added a conversion function to remove national characters ( like Á ) . However the subnodes and atoms nder PstlAdr node have their own conversion functions which do not have RP ( Remove National Char ) on them. Does that mean the conversion function at higher level gets overridded by subnode level conversion? 

The goal is to have no national char in PstlAdr node but the conversion function does not seem to be working. Any pointers?

entry.title: Duplicate Line Items Appearing In Cost Analysis of Process Order
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing an issue of duplicate line item in cost analysis for same material. First line is showing the target qty but showing the actual issued qty as 0 and whereas the second line item is showing actual target qty but  showing the target qty as 0. (Pls refer the red arrow marked lines from snap).

We have checked the cost estimate, Bill of material and it has only one item still we are facing this issue for all orders. It was working fine till the last month but the orders from this month are having this issue. 

Can you pls let me know what should I check to find out the root cause of issue.

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Download spool directly in excel
entry.content:
Is it possible to download a processing spool directly into excel ?
For example, in FAGLL03, when we run it online, we can download it directly into excel and all the fields are formatted correctly (date, values). When we run the job and download the spool, these fields are distorted.

entry.title: S_ALR_87013619 report - why there are no drill down reports assigned ?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

please support with below question:

S_ALR_87013619 report - why there are no drill down reports assigned ?

Thank you and best regards.

Pawel

entry.title: Assets with NBV for already depreciated assets
entry.content:
Issue  Description : For the below asset has NBV and  planned depreciation is not being calculated under posted values tab. Useful life of the asset is already expired.

Kindly suggest on how to depreciate the balance amount lying in the asset.

  •  
  • How to restrict posting to an asset for which NBV is zero and useful life is already expired ?
  •  
  • Also let us know if we can place any BTE validation to avoid such capitalization/acquisition further.
  •  
  • How to identify the asset for which assets are fully depreciated & further acquisitions are made after end of useful life and for which depreciation is not getting posted
  •  

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Adding a Customize Error Message to Asset Reversal in CJ8G if Sequence No in ANEP exceed 98000
entry.content:
Hi All,

Just like the title says, Is there a way that I can add an error message when trying to reverse an asset if the sequence no in ANEP table exceeds 98000? because in AW01N t-code whenever it exceed 99999 in sequence number. the sequence no of the asset that is process turns into blank. So to prevent it from happening i need to create an error message that will says that it already exceed the critical number.

entry.title: MB52
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

After updating stock prices in MB52 the difference amount should be automatically updated in price difference GL however it is not showing.

The GL should ahow the amount of Rs 153360 however it is not showing.

 

please advise.

entry.title: BAPI one time vendor
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the requirement to test a BAPI to post na accounting document but using a one time vendor. Which BAPI and fields in the BAPI I should use?

thanks in advance.

Regards.
